← REGULATORY HUB

Global Trade & Export Compliance

International regulatory adherence for global orbital distribution.

1. Export Control Classification Number (ECCN) 5D992.c

The simulation's neural-link encryption utilizes standard protocols (WSS/HTTPS) which fall under mass-market encryption exceptions. It is eligible for export to most terrestrial sectors under License Exception ENC.

2. Sanctioned Sectors

Deployment of Spaceforce Squadron is prohibited in regions currently under United Terran Coalition trade embargoes or identified as rogue sub-factions (e.g., specific segments of the Crimson Void not recognized as sovereign entities).

3. Age Ratings (International)

Consistent with IARC standards:

  • ESRB: E10+ (Fantasy Violence)
  • PEGI: 7 (Mild Violence)
  • CERO: A (All Ages)

4. Children's Privacy (COPPA/GDPR-K)

This simulation is not directed at pilots under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children without verified neural-link guardian consent.

COMPLIANCE_HASH: EXPT-884-GLBL-2026
SYSTEM_ORIGIN: UTC_EXPORT_CONTROL
